phrases.intent_en: Ask if the church is open to visitors
phrases.cultural_note: Église Sainte-Catherine is an active church. It is free to enter and open to visitors outside of services.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photos are allowed inside the church
phrases.text_local: Peut-on prendre des photos à l'intérieur ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TOHN PRAHN-druh day foh-TOH ah lehn-tay-RYUHR
phrases.cultural_note: Photography is generally allowed inside Église Sainte-Catherine, but without flash and outside of services.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bell tower is
phrases.cultural_note: The bell tower of Sainte-Catherine is unusually separate from the church, across the square.

responses.english: Across the way, on the other side of the square.
responses.phonetic: ahn FAHSS, duh LOH-truh koh-TAY duh lah PLAHS
responses.local: En face, de l'autre côté de la place.

phrases.intent_en: Ask when the next service takes place
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure est la prochaine messe ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel UHR eh lah proh-SHEHN MESS
phrases.cultural_note: Sainte-Catherine is an active parish church with regular services throughout the week.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des concerts ou des messes chantées dans cette église ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL day kohn-SAIR oo day MESS shahn-TAY dahn set ay-GLEEZ
phrases.cultural_note: The acoustics of the wooden interior are remarkable. Choral services and organ recitals are held regularly, particularly in summer. The Saturday and Sunday morning masses are sung in the traditional Gregorian style.

responses.english: Check the programme at the tourist office.
responses.phonetic: vay-ree-FYAY luh proh-GRAM ah loh-FEES duh too-REEZM
responses.local: Vérifiez le programme à l'office de tourisme.
